underlying_goal: Migrate from Bootstrap 3 to Tailwind CSS 4 while maintaining identical design, and replace RevSlider with modern CSS/JS hero components
friction_detail: Assistant removed too much CSS during cleanup breaking the event hero entirely, fixed overlay positioning inverted relative to text alignment, and initially added unwanted text clipping that user explicitly rejected.
brief_summary: User wanted to migrate from Bootstrap 3 to Tailwind CSS 4 and replace RevSlider with modern CSS/JS, which was mostly achieved with working hero components and legacy cleanup, though CSS breakage during cleanup caused friction.
user_instructions_to_assistant: no text truncation or clipping on titles
title width max 50%, never more than 2 lines
